headline: Google is rolling out its redesigned Workspace app icons
summary: Google Workspace apps are getting a new, gradient visual update. The redesigned icons are now widely rolling out to users. This fresh look was leaked last month.

headline: Sony is raising short-subscription prices for PlayStation Plus
summary: Sony is increasing prices for 1-month and 3-month PlayStation Plus subscriptions. The price hike is attributed to "ongoing market conditions." New pricing goes into effect starting May 20th.

headline: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are engaged in a high-stakes legal battle over OpenAI's direction. Musk sued OpenAI, alleging it abandoned its original mission for profit. The outcome could significantly impact the future of ChatGPT.

headline: Amazon Alexa Plus can now create AI-generated podcasts
summary: Alexa Plus, Amazon's upgraded AI assistant, can now generate podcasts on virtually any topic. Users provide a subject, and Alexa Plus will outline the discussion points. Its AI hosts can then guide the conversation.

headline: Confused Retailers Receive Mysterious Shipments Containing One of the PS4's Rarest Games, Poop Slinger
summary: Numerous independent video game stores have received unexpected packages. The mysterious shipments contain 'Poop Slinger,' a highly rare PS4 game. Retailers are reportedly confused by these unsolicited deliveries.

headline: This $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is Just $375 During the Wayfair Memorial Day Sale
summary: An $1,800 power lift recliner and massage chair is heavily discounted to $375. The significant price drop is part of Wayfair's Memorial Day Sale. It's suggested as a potential Father's Day gift.

headline: Buy One Board Game or Puzzle, Get One 50% Off Through This Stellar Offer at Target
summary: Target is running a 'Buy One, Get One 50% Off' promotion. This deal applies to a selection of board games, card games, and puzzles. The offer is available until May 25th.

headline: Sony Announces PlayStation Plus Price Increases 'Due to Ongoing Market Conditions'
summary: Sony has announced upcoming price increases for its PlayStation Plus subscription service. The company cites "ongoing market conditions" as the reason for the hike. This affects various tiers of the service.

headline: Married at First Sight UK brides tell BBC they were raped by on-screen husbands
summary: Brides from 'Married at First Sight UK' have informed the BBC of alleged rapes. The assaults were reportedly committed by their on-screen husbands. Channel 4 was allegedly aware of one claim prior to broadcast, but the woman still featured.

headline: Burnham pledges not to 're-run' Brexit arguments
summary: Potential leadership challenger Burnham has vowed not to reignite Brexit debates. He explicitly states he is not proposing the UK rejoining the EU. His focus is on future policy, not past arguments.

headline: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
summary: The bodies of all five Italian divers who vanished last week in the Maldives have been recovered. Officials confirmed the tragic discovery to the BBC. A search operation concluded with finding all individuals.

headline: Prince William selling 20% of duchy property for housing and nature projects
summary: Prince William's Duchy of Cornwall is set to sell 20% of its land holdings. The sale aims to fund new housing initiatives and nature conservation projects. The estate currently spans 128,000 acres.
